tools.name: deploy_html
tools.description: Deploy HTML content to EdgeOne Pages, return the public URL

value.description:
Provide the full HTML markup you wish to publish.
After deployment, the system will generate and return a public URL where your content can be accessed.

tools.name: deploy_folder_or_zip
tools.description: Deploy a built frontend directory (or zip file) to EdgeOne Pages. Returns: the deployment URL and project metadata.

builtFolderPath.description: Provide the absolute path to the built frontend folder(or zip file) you wish to deploy.

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'value' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)

findings.title: Unbounded input: no size/content constraints
findings.description: String parameter 'builtFolderPath' in input_schema has no validation constraints (no pattern, format, enum, or length limits)
